description: Integration, Testing, and Final Wiring - Wire everything together into the main system, add comprehensive tests for all new modules, ensure the autonomous loop works end-to-end, and verify the entire system builds and runs. Add the MK OS configuration system that ties together crypto, homelab, mind, sync, and telegram into one coherent autonomous agent.
steps: Create MK_OS/config/mk_config.cpp - Class MKConfig that loads configuration from ~/.mk_os/config.json. Settings include: telegram_token, exchange_api_key, exchange_api_secret, devices[] (hostname, ip, ssh_key), trading_mode (paper/live), risk_limits, sync_interval, learning_schedule, cgroup_limits. Provides typed getters. Validates on load.

Create MK_OS/config/default_config.json - Default configuration template with all settings documented. Paper trading by default. Conservative risk limits. 5-minute sync interval. Nighttime learning schedule.

Update MK_OS/system/mk_entry.cpp to: include all new modules (crypto/, mind/, homelab/, sync/, config/, linux/drivers/), add them to MKSystem struct, wire up the autonomous loop in the daemon (goal engine ticks, trading bot scans, knowledge sync runs on schedule, resource monitor checks before heavy tasks)

Update MK_OS/system/daemon.cpp to register new scheduled jobs: crypto market scan (every 5 min), knowledge sync (every 5 min), device health check (every 1 min), autonomous learning (every 30 min during idle), goal evaluation (every 15 min), portfolio rebalance check (every 1 hour)

Update MK_OS/ai_core/smart_router.cpp to add new route types: CRYPTO (for crypto questions/commands), HOMELAB (for device/service management), MIND (for goals/mastery/strategy queries). Add keywords for routing to these new modules.

Update MK_OS/tests/test_main.cpp to add tests for: MKTechnicalAnalysis (RSI calculation, MACD, Bollinger Bands), MKRiskManager (position limits, drawdown detection), MKDeviceRegistry (add/remove/find devices), MKResourceMonitor (resource check logic), MKGoalEngine (goal creation, step breakdown), MKKnowledgeSync (conflict resolution), MKMasteryNetwork (skill leveling), MKConfig (config loading). At least 20 new test cases with 100+ assertions.

Create MK_OS/mk_wrapper_enhanced.sh - Enhanced wrapper script that checks system resources before starting MK, sets up cgroups if available, configures environment variables, starts the Python device_monitor in background, then launches the MK binary. Implements the 'don't crash' first principle.
Update MK_OS/Makefile to add targets: 'tools-python' (validate Python syntax), 'lint' (run basic checks), 'full-test' (build + test + python check + shell check)
acceptance_criteria: make in MK_OS/ compiles the entire system with zero errors
make test passes ALL tests (old and new) - minimum 30 test cases, 250+ assertions
Smart router correctly routes crypto/homelab/mind queries to new modules
Configuration system loads and validates settings
Daemon has all scheduled jobs registered
mk_entry.cpp includes all new modules and MKSystem struct has all new members
Wrapper script passes bash -n syntax check
The system can start up, run the autonomous loop, and gracefully shut down
